# Pusulam — Turkey's Collective Intelligence Platform
# https://pusulam.ai

## About
Pusulam is a prediction market platform for Turkey. Users predict outcomes of real-world events using virtual currency "Oy Hakki" (Vote Rights). It is NOT a gambling/betting site. No real money is used.

## Content
- Prediction markets on Turkish politics, economy, technology, world events, education
- CPMM (Constant Product Market Maker) based probability pricing
- Community predictions with calibration scoring
- AI-powered market analysis assistant

## Structure
- /tr/piyasalar — All prediction markets (Turkish)
- /en/piyasalar — All prediction markets (English)
- /tr/piyasalar/[slug] — Individual market with probability, comments, trading
- /tr/skor — Leaderboard
- /tr/kullanicilar — User directory
- /tr/asistan — AI analysis assistant

## Key Terms
- Oy Hakki = Vote Rights (virtual currency, not real money)
- Piyasa = Market (prediction market)
- Tahmin = Prediction/Forecast
- Kolektif Zeka = Collective Intelligence

## Languages
Turkish (default), English, German, Spanish, French, Arabic, Portuguese, Kinyarwanda, Swahili, Amharic

## Contact
Domain: pusulam.ai
